description: Official Replicate API schema for google/gemini-3-pro

audio.description: Input audio to send with the prompt (max 1 audio file, up to 8.4 hours)
audio.title: Audio

images.description: Input images to send with the prompt (max 10 images, each up to 7MB)
images.title: Images

max_output_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate
max_output_tokens.title: Max Output Tokens

prompt.description: The text prompt to send to the model
prompt.title: Prompt

system_instruction.description: System instruction to guide the model's behavior
system_instruction.title: System Instruction

top_p.description: Nucleus sampling parameter - the model considers the results of the tokens with top_p probability mass
top_p.title: Top P

videos.description: Input videos to send with the prompt (max 10 videos, each up to 45 minutes)
videos.title: Videos

title: gemini-3-pro Input Schema
